sources.title: Elle - Sing for your dream (FUN MUSICAL in German, watch comedy in full length)

metadata.Plot: Michèle seems indestructible. Head of a successful video game company, she brings the same ruthless attitude to her love life as to business. Being attacked in her home by an unknown assailant changes Michèle's life forever. When she resolutely tracks the man down, they are both drawn into a curious and thrilling game-a game that may, at any moment, spiral out of control.
metadata.Actors: Isabelle Huppert, Laurent Lafitte, Anne Consigny
metadata.Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 70 wins & 97 nominations total
